message:
feat(agents): integrate LLM retry with exponential backoff into agent loop

Wraps client.complete() in the agent's plan phase with retryLLMCall(),
automatically retrying transient errors (429, 500, 502, 503, network
errors) with exponential backoff. Non-retryable errors (401, 400) and
AbortError propagate immediately. Retry attempts are logged at warn level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
